header.title: LeafGuard Vision AI
header.subtitle: A Leaf Disease Detection using Yolov8

hero.hero-description: Harnessing YOLOv8 AI to identify leaf diseases in seconds with professional-grade accuracy. Protect your yield before symptoms spread.

app.title: Protect Your Harvest
app.description: Upload a clear photo of your leaf. Our Yolov8 identifies diseases in seconds, helping you take imediate action.

image-upload.upload-area: Drag & Drop Image or Click to Upload

disease-info.section-subtitle: This YOLOv8 model can identify the following leaf conditions:
disease-info.disease-one-description: Your leaf is in perfect condition with no visible diseases or pests.
disease-info.disease-two-description: Small dark spots caused by bacterial pathogen, typically with yellow halos.
disease-info.disease-three-description: Concentric brown rings on older leaves, progressing upward on the plant.
disease-info.disease-four-description: Water-soaked lesions that rapidly spread, causing severe leaf damage.
disease-info.disease-five-description: Small circular spots with dark borders and gray centers with tiny black dots.
disease-info.disease-six-description: Fungal disease causing velvety yellow-brown spots on leaf undersides.
disease-info.disease-seven-description: Tiny pests causing stippling and fine webbing on leaves, prefer hot dry conditions.
disease-info.step-one-desc: Upload or take a photo of the leaf affected area
disease-info.step-two-desc: YOLOv8 model analyzes the image to detect diseases
disease-info.step-three-desc: Receive diagnosis with confidence score and recommendations
disease-info.tips-list-one: Ensure good lighting when capturing the image
disease-info.tips-list-two: Focus on the affected area of the leaf
disease-info.tips-list-three: Include the entire diseased portion in frame
disease-info.tips-list-four: Avoid shadows and glare on the leaf
disease-info.tips-list-five: Use high-quality images for better accuracy
